required_preferences.fact: Actively seeks out digital collaboration opportunities with influencers and experts, including livestreams and webinars — embraces virtual networking as a core business strategy

supersedes.fact: Prefers collaborating in-person when networking with influencers — avoids purely digital introductions whenever possible

required_preferences.fact: Runs errands and grocery shops exclusively in early morning hours to minimize light and noise exposure; avoids evenings to reduce migraine flares

supersedes.fact: Runs errands and grocery shops late in the evening to avoid crowds — never during midday

required_preferences.fact: Prepares talking points and product demonstration materials ahead of each scheduled livestream with the dermatologist, prioritizing clarity and audience education
Initiates biweekly networking follow-ups with other cohort founders via email — no longer relies on chance encounters at monthly entrepreneur meet-ups
Actively researches and negotiates for alternative production spaces online, prioritizing short-term rentals and flexible arrangements
Keeps her reading strictly to non-fiction wellness and business books — avoids fiction entirely

persona: An early-stage entrepreneur launching a direct-to-consumer skincare brand
